package rulecoverage

func PositiveGrpcDialPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "grpc_dial_per_request"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`grpc.Dial(addr, opts...)` or `grpc.NewClient(addr, opts...)` inside handler functions"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
